summary: Comprehensive testing of ScanSavvy Master Bundle system complete. All P0 and P1 features working correctly. Backend 100% (23/23 tests passed). Frontend 100% for all tested features. The app now uses ONE MASTER QR CODE containing ALL coupons from selected stores.
passed_tests: P0 - Backend: Create user, select stores, enable manufacturer coupons - PASSED
P0 - Backend: Master bundle contains id, qr_url, week_label, valid_until, coupon_count, total_savings, stores_included, coupons array - PASSED
P0 - Backend: QR scan page (/api/bundle/{id}/view) renders mobile-friendly HTML with all coupons - PASSED
P0 - Frontend: Onboarding flow completes and creates user with bundle - PASSED
P0 - Frontend: Dashboard shows ONE master QR code (not multiple store cards) - PASSED
P1 - Dashboard shows: week label (Week of March 15), valid until date (March 21, 2026), coupon count (26), total savings ($92.5), stores included (Walmart, Target, Kroger, Manufacturer) - PASSED
P1 - 'View Included Coupons' button expands coupon list - PASSED
P1 - 'Save QR to Phone' button present - PASSED
P1 - 'Refresh QR Code' button present and regenerates bundle - PASSED
P1 - Settings tab allows editing stores, toggling manufacturer coupons - PASSED
P2 - Landing page shows correct hero ('All Your Coupons. One QR Code.'), Popular section, How It Works - PASSED
P2 - Mobile responsive design on dashboard and QR scan page - PASSED
Backend API root endpoint returns version 2.0.0 - PASSED
Store listing, search, and category filtering - PASSED
User CRUD operations with tier support - PASSED
Master bundle generation with all store coupons - PASSED
Bundle refresh generates new bundle ID - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: All coupon data is MOCKED/CURATED - designed to be replaced with real API later
App.js is a large single file (~1500 lines) - consider splitting into separate component files for maintainability
QR code is generated client-side using canvas - works but could use a proper QR library for production

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all P0, P1, P2 features tested and working)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Master Bundle system fully tested and working. Key features: (1) ONE QR code for ALL coupons, (2) Dashboard shows week label, valid until, coupon count, total savings, stores included, (3) QR scan page at /api/bundle/{id}/view shows mobile-friendly HTML with all coupons, (4) Settings tab allows store editing and manufacturer coupons toggle, (5) Bundle refresh works. All onboarding steps work correctly: Step 1 (name/email), Step 2 (store selection), Step 3 (preferences with manufacturer coupons toggle).
mocked_data_note: ALL COUPON DATA IS MOCKED/CURATED - CURATED_COUPONS dict in server.py contains production-like structure but not from real APIs. Designed to be replaced with real coupon API integration later.
